user.title: Irrigation Proxy
user.description: Give this irrigation program a name. Zones, schedule and other settings are configured afterwards via the options menu.

abort.already_configured: An irrigation program with this name already exists.

init.title: Irrigation program
init.description: Pick what you want to configure, then hit Save & close.

basics.title: Basics
basics.description: When should the program run, and is there a master/pump valve on the main line?

data_description.schedule_start_times: Example: "06:00, 20:30". The program starts at each of these times on every active weekday.
data_description.master_valve_entity_id: If set, the master valve opens after each zone valve and closes before it, so the line is drained between zones.

zones.title: Zones
zones.description: Add, edit or remove zones. Zones run in the order shown here.

zone_add.title: Add zone
zone_add.description: Pick a valve entity and give this zone a name + runtime.

zone_edit.title: Edit zone {zone_name}
zone_edit.description: Update the zone or tick "delete" to remove it from the program.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.description: Defaults for the inter-zone pause, master-valve drain delay and the deadman-timer limit. These same values are also exposed as Number entities on the dashboard – live tweaks there persist back to these fields.

data_description.inter_zone_delay_seconds: Pause after a zone finishes before the next zone starts. Counted on top of the irrigation time, never deducted from it.
data_description.depressurize_seconds: Wait after closing the master valve before closing the zone valve – lets pressure drain safely. Added to the program total; the configured zone duration is unchanged.
data_description.max_runtime_minutes: Safety deadman: if a valve stays open longer than this, it is force-closed. Applies to zone valves and the manual master-valve switch.

safety.title: Safety
safety.description: Configure safety mechanisms that can stop the program and close every valve.

safety_leak_sensors.title: Leak sensors
safety_leak_sensors.description: Pick the water-leak and water-shortage binary sensors that should trigger an immediate emergency shutdown. If any of them reports 'on', the running program is stopped and every configured valve (zones + master) is force-closed. A persistent notification is raised and the 'irrigation_proxy_leak_detected' event is fired for automations.

data_description.leak_sensors: For Sonoff SWV valves via Zigbee2MQTT these are typically 'binary_sensor.sonoff_swv_*_water_leak' and 'binary_sensor.sonoff_swv_*_water_shortage'. Multiple sensors can be selected; any one reporting 'on' triggers the shutdown.

error.valve_required: Please pick a valve entity for this zone.
error.invalid_start_times: Enter start times as HH:MM, comma-separated (e.g. "06:00, 20:30").

start_program.name: Start Irrigation Program
start_program.description: Start the configured irrigation program. Runs all zones sequentially.

stop_program.name: Stop Irrigation Program
stop_program.description: Stop the running irrigation program and close all valves.
